title: 3.1 Install + dispatch smoke test
description: Install to throwaway --target dir; confirm skills/naba lands with commands/ subdir, router resolves an inline subcommand (/naba generate), AND one composite runs its subagent through an end-to-end naba call that WRITES A FILE (e.g. batch -o loop) so a child-side Write/Glob permission gap surfaces.
close_reason: Install+dispatch smoke test PASS. --target install lands skills/naba + commands/*.md. Inline: real 'naba generate' wrote 1.0MB PNG. Composite: dispatched subagent ran 2x 'naba generate -o' end-to-end writing PNGs in child context (C5), confirmed child Bash+Write grants (N1). Discovered child may lack Glob -> updated SKILL.md+IG to not depend on Glob (explicit -o + Bash ls). See findings/exp-002.
